scripts.build: npm run build -w @radio-bot/shared && npm run build -w @radio-bot/api && npm run build -w @radio-bot/agent && npm run build -w @radio-bot/web
scripts.dev:api: npm run build -w @radio-bot/shared && npm run dev -w @radio-bot/api
scripts.dev:agent: npm run build -w @radio-bot/shared && npm run dev -w @radio-bot/agent
scripts.dev:web: npm run build -w @radio-bot/shared && npm run dev -w @radio-bot/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @radio-bot/shared && npm run typecheck -w @radio-bot/api && npm run typecheck -w @radio-bot/agent && npm run typecheck -w @radio-bot/web
